name: Finn Baker
description:
I love pretty men who are assholes. Think of those videos of cats hissing while grooming new kittens, that's him. Someone requested a catboy bot with a dog user a bit ago and I finally got around to it. Hope they like him T-T. User can be any dog breed.

YALL I HAD A FUCKING HEART ATTACK JUST NOW. I published him, got an error message after and then had a completely blank character creation page. Bout cried
